name: enhance_claims_tools
description: Third priority: Polish and scale claims tools (coop-claims-tool / no-proof-claims.com). Enhance with contractor app integration for full pipeline (leads -> contracts -> claims). Use no-proof-deployer patterns, Stripe 12% fees, Twilio, etc. Monetize via production service fees.

steps.description: Review coop-claims-tool (no-proof-claims.com). Use no-proof-deployer if re-deploy needed. Verify current prod at https://no-proof-claims.com.
Add handoff from SafeHire escrow to claims (e.g. auto-create claim on dispute). Update no-proof-deployer tools and TASKs.
Enhance Stripe/Twilio flows. Use grok_com_gamma for user-facing docs. Track metrics in Linear. Enable credit/fee sharing with contractor app.
Expose claims dashboard/metrics to grokzilla.sites backend. Push integration code.

symbiotic_protocol: no-proof-deployer (prod) -> contractor_app (leads/escrow feed) -> claims (dispute resolution + 12% fees) -> grokzilla (unified dashboard).
